program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Define field types, enums, stable identifiers, reference rules, and ownership metadata for ProductContract, AIControlRule, HermesGate, ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, and BlockedClaim.
claude_questions: Do the field_shapes cover every required field declared in the M01 contract shell for all six control-plane entities?
Are enum_ref and reference fields backed by registries or explicit targets?
Do tenant-scoped shapes all include tenant_id and preserve fail-closed tenant boundary semantics?
Does ownership_metadata preserve Hermes as evidence-only, Claude as read-only review, and HumanApproval as non-delegable?
Is anything missing before RP00.P00.M02.S01 can be promoted from implemented to production_ready?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
